threats.title: Unvalidated Input – Data Modification
threats.description: The system does not properly validate or sanitize user input before processing or storing it. This could allow attackers to inject malicious code, modify data, or manipulate system behavior.
threats.affected_component: All Input Handling Components (Forms, APIs, Database Interactions)
threats.attack_vector: Injection attacks (SQLi, XSS, Command Injection) via unfiltered user input.  An attacker could modify data in the database or execute arbitrary code on the server.
mitigations: Implement strict input validation and sanitization at all stages.
Use parameterized queries or prepared statements to prevent SQL injection.
Employ Content Security Policy (CSP) to mitigate XSS attacks.

threats.title: Insufficient Authorization Checks
threats.description: The system lacks proper authorization checks, allowing users to access resources or perform actions they are not authorized to perform. This could lead to a user gaining administrative privileges or accessing sensitive data.
threats.attack_vector: Exploiting vulnerabilities in the access control logic. An attacker could bypass authorization checks and gain elevated privileges.
mitigations: Implement robust access control mechanisms based on the principle of least privilege.
Regularly review and update access control policies.
Utilize role-based access control (RBAC).

threats.title: Weak Authentication Mechanism
threats.description: The system lacks defined authentication mechanisms, potentially allowing attackers to impersonate legitimate users or systems. Without multi-factor authentication (MFA) or robust password policies, attackers could easily gain unauthorized access.
threats.attack_vector: Exploiting weak or missing authentication logic.  An attacker could craft malicious requests mimicking valid user sessions or bypass authentication entirely.
mitigations: Implement strong authentication mechanisms, including MFA.
Enforce strong password policies (length, complexity, rotation).
Utilize a secure authentication protocol (e.g., OAuth 2.0, SAML).

threats.title: Resource Exhaustion – Uncontrolled Processing
threats.description: The system is vulnerable to denial-of-service attacks due to a lack of rate limiting, insufficient resource allocation, or poorly designed algorithms.  This could overwhelm the system and make it unavailable to legitimate users.
threats.affected_component: Application Server, Database Server, Network Infrastructure
threats.attack_vector: Flooding the system with requests, exploiting resource-intensive operations, or triggering infinite loops.
mitigations: Implement rate limiting to restrict the number of requests from a single source.
Optimize resource allocation to prevent bottlenecks.
Employ caching mechanisms to reduce server load.

threats.title: Insufficient Data Masking/Redaction
threats.description: Sensitive data is not adequately masked or redacted in logs, error messages, or database queries. This exposes confidential information to unauthorized individuals.
threats.affected_component: Logging System, Database Queries, Error Handling
threats.attack_vector: Accessing logs or database queries that contain sensitive data. An attacker could gain insight into the system's internal workings or steal confidential information.
mitigations: Implement data masking and redaction techniques.
Restrict access to sensitive data based on the principle of least privilege.
Regularly review and update data masking policies.

mapped_threats.title: Unvalidated Input – Data Modification
mapped_threats.description: The system does not properly validate or sanitize user input before processing or storing it. This could allow attackers to inject malicious code, modify data, or manipulate system behavior.
mapped_threats.affected_component: All Input Handling Components (Forms, APIs, Database Interactions)
mapped_threats.attack_vector: Injection attacks (SQLi, XSS, Command Injection) via unfiltered user input.  An attacker could modify data in the database or execute arbitrary code on the server.
mitigations: Implement strict input validation and sanitization at all stages.
Use parameterized queries or prepared statements to prevent SQL injection.

gaps: Lack of comprehensive coverage for CM (Configuration Management), CP (Preparedness), and SI (Security Identification) controls within the NIST framework.
Limited ASVS coverage beyond V2, requiring further investment in controls V3 and beyond.
priorities: High:  'Insufficient Authorization Checks' (Elevation of Privilege) – Critical severity, impacting multiple controls. Immediate investigation and remediation required.
Medium: 'Unvalidated Input' (Tampering) – Critical severity, requires rapid implementation of input validation and sanitization techniques across systems.

dfd_mermaid:
flowchart TB

    %% Styling
    classDef external fill:#e1f5fe,stroke:#0277bd,stroke-width:2px
    classDef process fill:#e8f5e9,stroke:#2e7d32,stroke-width:2px
    classDef datastore fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#ef6c00,stroke-width:2px
    classDef threat fill:#ffebee,stroke:#c62828,stroke-width:3px

    subgraph External["External Entities"]
        user[("👤 User")]
        admin[("👔 Admin")]
        external_api[("🌐 External API")]
    end

    subgraph TrustBoundary["Trust Boundary"]
        subgraph Frontend["Frontend Layer"]
            web_app["🖥️ Web Application"]
        end

        subgraph Backend["Backend Layer"]
            api_gateway["🚪 API Gateway"]
            auth_service["🔐 Auth Service"]
            core_api["⚙️ Core API"]
        end

        subgraph Data["Data Layer"]
            database[("💾 Database")]
            cache[("⚡ Cache")]
        end
    end

    %% Data Flows
    user -->|"🔒 HTTPS"| web_app
    admin -->|"🔒 HTTPS + MFA"| web_app
    web_app -->|"🔒 API Calls"| api_gateway
    api_gateway -->|"🔒 Auth Check"| auth_service
    api_gateway -->|"🔒 Business Logic"| core_api
    auth_service -->|"🔒 User Data"| database
    core_api -->|"🔒 CRUD"| database
    core_api -->|"⚠️ Session"| cache
    core_api -->|"🔒 External Call"| external_api

    %% Apply Styles
    class user,admin,external_api external
    class web_app,api_gateway,auth_service,core_api process
    class database,cache datastore
    class api_gateway,auth_service,database threat

custom_policies.name: check_tampering_1
custom_policies.guideline: Implement strict input validation and sanitization at all stages.

custom_policies.name: check_elevation_of_privilege_2
custom_policies.guideline: Implement robust access control mechanisms based on the principle of least privilege.

custom_policies.name: check_spoofing_3

custom_policies.name: check_denial_of_service_4
custom_policies.guideline: Implement rate limiting to restrict the number of requests from a single source.

custom_policies.name: check_information_disclosure_5
custom_policies.guideline: Implement data masking and redaction techniques.

semgrep.config_file:
rules:
- fix: cursor.execute($QUERY, (params,))
  id: security-custom-1
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: "Unvalidated Input \u2013 Data Modification"
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-89
    owasp: A03:2021
    threat_category: Tampering
  patterns:
  - pattern: cursor.execute($QUERY)
    pattern-not: cursor.execute($QUERY, $PARAMS)
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-2
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Insufficient Authorization Checks
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-269
    owasp: A01:2021
    threat_category: Elevation of Privilege
  patterns:
  - pattern: eval($X)
  - pattern: exec($X)
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-3
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Weak Authentication Mechanism
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-287
    owasp: A07:2021
    threat_category: Spoofing
  patterns:
  - pattern: password = "..."
  - pattern: secret = "..."
  - pattern: api_key = "..."
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-4
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: "Resource Exhaustion \u2013 Uncontrolled Processing"
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-400
    owasp: A05:2021
    threat_category: Denial of Service
  patterns:
  - pattern: eval($X)
  - pattern: exec($X)
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-5
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Insufficient Data Masking/Redaction
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-200
    owasp: A01:2021
    threat_category: Information Disclosure
  patterns:
  - pattern: print($SENSITIVE)
  - pattern: console.log($SENSITIVE)
  severity: ERROR
